summary: Completed testing of Import Document feature. All 14 backend tests pass. Frontend UI verified: Generate Forms dropdown shows 'Import Other Document' option, Import Document dialog opens with all 6 document type options (Reference 1, Reference 2, Health Screening, Contract, Induction, Handbook), imported documents appear in Forms tab with 'completed imported' status and 'Locked' badge, Checklist tab shows requirements as complete after import.

minor.issue: Response model GeneratedFormResponse does not include 'imported' field, though it's stored in database. Status 'completed_imported' is sufficient to identify imported forms.

passed_tests: Backend: Import Reference 1 document - status 200, form_status 'completed_imported'
Backend: Import Reference 2 document - status 200, form_status 'completed_imported'
Backend: Import Health Screening document - status 200, form_status 'completed_imported'
Backend: Import Contract document - status 200, form_status 'completed_imported'
Backend: Import Induction document - status 200, form_status 'completed_imported'
Backend: Import Handbook document - status 200, form_status 'completed_imported'
Backend: Invalid form_type returns 400 error
Backend: Non-existent employee returns 404 error
Backend: Imported form appears in forms list with correct status
Backend: Imported document linked to correct requirement_id
Backend: Compliance checklist updated after import
Backend: Import without file returns 422 validation error
Backend: Import without form_type returns 422 validation error
Backend: Import replaces existing document for same requirement
Frontend: Generate Forms dropdown shows 'Import Other Document' option
Frontend: Import Document dialog opens correctly
Frontend: Document type dropdown shows all 6 options (Reference 1, Reference 2, Health Screening, Contract, Induction, Handbook)
Frontend: Submit button disabled until file selected
Frontend: Forms tab shows imported forms with 'completed imported' status and 'Locked' badge
Frontend: Checklist tab shows imported requirements as 'Complete' with 'Verify All' button
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_import_document.py (new test file for import document feature)
seed_data_creation: Used existing employee Olakunle Alonge (id: d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77). Test documents imported for Reference 1, Reference 2, Health Screening, Contract, Induction, and Handbook requirements.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Import Document feature fully functional. POST /api/generated-forms/import-document accepts form_type (reference_1, reference_2, health_screening, contract, induction, handbook), document_file, and optional notes. Creates generated_form with status 'completed_imported' and employee_document linked to the requirement. Frontend has 'Import Other Document' menu option in Generate Forms dropdown and dialog with all document type options. Imported forms show in Forms tab with 'completed imported' status and 'Locked' badge. Checklist requirements show as 'Complete' after import.
